title: Momonosuke Becomes Shogun
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Wano Citizens, Orochi, Unknown person #5, Kaido, Unknown person #6 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Head to Bakura Town!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They're broadcasting something from the Capital!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't the time to just stand around and watch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: upon

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ebisu Town

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahaha haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What's all the fuss about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's a light- scroll...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: shall trans- mission...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: ...from the flower capital!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What do you mean you're Kaido's Son?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So this war isn't over yet?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hold on!! I'm not your enemy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In fact, I've been following your exploits in the news for ages.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, I knew your crew was made up of a lot of weird-looking people, but meeting you all in the flesh is still quite a shock...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kaido's-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: 'You're one to talk with those horns!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway!! I'll be sailing with you from now on!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: I go by Kozuki Open,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you can call me YAMATO! Nice to meet you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're joining OUR Crew?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yohoho! I approved

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Not as much as me!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: haha, how amusing..(!)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll need to get confirmation from the captain before I'll be convinced.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fair enough.

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: So is Luffy gonna be okay...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: his battle was so intense... and that form of his...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: “I’m not sure if I’m going to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey!! Who said you could run off?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Eeek!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOUNG MASTER, PLEASE!! WE DON'T WANT TO BE SERVICES LIKE THE OTHERS!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, this one doesn't seem like an enemy at any rate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Quit whining and stay put!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That reminds me, what's gonna happen to these guys?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My jutsu always wears off when the moon's shape comes back around.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So it only lasts a month?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The animals usually go back to normal afterwards...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But some stay tamed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure they get to choose what they like best!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master! I want to stay by your side, Im happy like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That makes me so glad, Horsella- Chan!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd love it if you stayed with me, but not as my servant...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd rather think of you as a mother!:)

dialogue.speaker: Hiyori
dialogue.text: Look! Komurasaki and kin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...and everyone else, they're kneeling!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who is that...?

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 47 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
